description: Book Club reading list with thematic tags for the Content Curation Agent Connector. Populated by Tom over time. The Connector queries this by theme, not by title.

books.title: Example: Meditations on First Philosophy
books.author: René Descartes
books.core_idea: Systematic doubt as a method for finding certainty — what can survive radical skepticism?
